nodes.label: tokens.css
nodes.summary: Design token definitions for the entire VIVACE 2026 stamp card app. Declares all CSS custom properties on :root, including the full palette (red, green, orange, blue, yellow, pink, purple, cyan, mint), neutral tones (ink, cream, paper), and the navy nav background colour. All other CSS files consume these variables.

nodes.label: base.css
nodes.summary: Global reset and body-level styles. Applies a universal box-sizing reset, disables user selection across all elements (re-enables it for inputs), and sets the full-page layout with the Fredoka font, a blue textured background image (blu-bg.png), and a centred flex-column body.

nodes.label: nav.css
nodes.summary: Styles for the sticky top navigation bar and the animated yellow marquee ticker below it. The nav uses the --nav-bg token for its dark navy background and hosts the VIVACE brand name on the left and an uppercase Montserrat label on the right. The marquee bar scrolls event text infinitely with a CSS animation and star-prefixed spans.

nodes.label: card.css
nodes.summary: The primary stylesheet for the VIVACE 2026 bingo/stamp card UI. Covers the full card layout including: the rounded card wrapper and header with decorative gradient overlay, participant name display and switch button, animated progress bar, a 3-column checkpoint grid where each booth card has a coloured accent bar and a bob animation, a prize redemption grid with locked/available/redeemed states, a full-screen login overlay with form inputs and error messaging, a PIN-entry modal for booth check-ins, and a congrats modal with a pop animation. Uses a neo-brutalist design language (thick ink borders, hard drop shadows, offset hover interactions) throughout.

nodes.label: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Tooling configuration file for the understand-anything analysis plugin. Specifies file/directory patterns to exclude from analysis using .gitignore syntax. Currently only activates exclusion of the `images/` directory; all other suggestions (test files, .env, .DS_Store, .vercel) are commented out.

nodes.label: bingo.js
nodes.summary: Main client-side JavaScript for the VIVACE 2026 stamp card game. Manages the complete user lifecycle: username login/logout with per-user localStorage isolation, booth stamp verification via a client-side hash check (matching server-side utils/hash.js), progress tracking (progress bar, stamp count), prize redemption gating, a confetti canvas animation on full card completion, and a congratulations modal. Consumes three server-injected globals: BOOTH_CODES (booth-id → hash map), TOTAL_BOOTHS (integer), and PRIZE_CONFIG (prize-tier → required-stamp-count map). Exposes handleLogin, handleBoothClick, and handlePrizeClick as window globals for inline HTML event handlers.

nodes.label: simpleHash
nodes.summary: DJB2-variant hash function that converts a string to an integer hash string. Must stay in sync with server-side utils/hash.js. Used by verifyCode to validate booth QR/secret codes against pre-hashed BOOTH_CODES values.

nodes.label: loadState
nodes.summary: Reads a user's visited booth list and redeemed prize list from localStorage using per-user namespaced keys (vivace_{username}_visited and vivace_{username}_redeemed). Returns safe defaults on parse failure.

nodes.label: saveState
nodes.summary: Persists the current user's visitedBooths and redeemedPrizes arrays to localStorage. Called after every stamp or prize redemption event.

nodes.label: updateUI
nodes.summary: Central UI refresh function. Toggles the 'visited' CSS class on all .checkpoint-card elements, updates the progress bar fill width and stamp count, and toggles 'available'/'redeemed' CSS classes on .prize-circle elements based on stamp count thresholds from PRIZE_CONFIG. Also sets cursor style to reflect interactability.

nodes.label: launchConfetti
nodes.summary: Runs a 4-second canvas-based confetti animation using the #confettiCanvas element. Creates 160 rectangular confetti pieces with randomised position, size, color, fall speed, drift, and spin. Uses requestAnimationFrame for the draw loop; fades out with a CSS opacity transition and hides the canvas when done.

nodes.label: showCongrats
nodes.summary: Triggers the win state: launches the confetti animation and shows the #congratsModal. Called (with a 500ms delay) when verifyCode detects all booths have been stamped.

nodes.label: verifyCode
nodes.summary: Validates the code entered in the booth modal against the server-provided BOOTH_CODES hash map. On match: pushes the booth ID to visitedBooths, persists state, refreshes UI, closes the modal, and (if all booths visited) schedules showCongrats. On mismatch: displays an inline error and clears/refocuses the input.

nodes.label: handleLogin (window.handleLogin)
nodes.summary: Window-global login handler. Reads the loginInput value, normalises to lowercase for storage key consistency, loads that user's persisted state, updates the name display element, hides the login overlay, and refreshes the UI. Exposed as window.handleLogin for inline HTML onclick usage.

nodes.label: handleBoothClick (window.handleBoothClick)
nodes.summary: Window-global click handler for booth/checkpoint cards. Guards against re-visiting already-stamped booths, then populates and opens the code-entry modal with the booth's name and logo from data attributes. Exposed as window.handleBoothClick.

nodes.label: handlePrizeClick (window.handlePrizeClick)
nodes.summary: Window-global prize redemption handler. Validates the prize hasn't already been redeemed and that the user has sufficient stamps. On user confirmation, pushes the prize ID to redeemedPrizes, persists state, and refreshes UI. Exposed as window.handlePrizeClick.

nodes.label: init (IIFE auto-login)
nodes.summary: Immediately-invoked function that runs on page load. Checks localStorage for a saved username; if found, restores the user session silently (skipping the login overlay) by loading state and refreshing the UI.
